_comment: Migration 0017 hand-modified detection baseline. See HASHING-NOTE.md for the hashing method, version coverage rationale, and the token-substitution caveat. Keys: <stack> -> <known-add-observability-wrapper-version> -> { wrapper_file, sha256 }. sha256 is over the file BYTES of the OLD (pre-1.16.0) scaffolded wrapper entry file, exactly as shipped on the claude-workflow `main` branch at add-observability v0.4.x (the shape downstream projects legitimately have before this migration). cf-cloudflare-pages is intentionally absent: it never shipped a wrapper before 1.16.0, so no downstream project can have a pre-existing cf-pages wrapper to detect.
